title: Agent-Tools Platform manifest (tool.yaml)
description: CONTRACT (Phase 0). Promotes a Hermes skill into a launchable Tool. Lives beside SKILL.md. Worker W-F implements the loader/validator; the future Workbench renders from this. Keep in lockstep with the Zod mirror.

steps.description: Ordered workflow steps, derived from the skill's stage table.

ref.description: Path to the skill reference/stage doc.

ui.description: Per-step UI hint for the Workbench.

swarm.description: When true, the run is widened to allow the native Task tool + the claude-flow (Ruflo) MCP server, and the session folder is provisioned with `ruflo init` + a steering CLAUDE.md before the agent's first turn.

steering.description: Filename of a steering doc (relative to the skill's assets/, written as CLAUDE.md into the provisioned session folder) that instructs the orchestrating agent.

permission_mode.description: Claude Code permission mode for the run. Autonomous tools that must write into .claude/ and implement code unattended use 'bypassPermissions' (the container is the sandbox). Omit for the curated default (acceptEdits).

brain.description: One-brain wiring: what the tool reads in / writes out.
